user.title: Add RFWC5 Keypad
user.description: Found {device_count} Z-Wave device(s). Select the device for your RFWC5 keypad.

indicator.title: Select Indicator Entity
indicator.description: Select the indicator sensor or number entity for {device_name}.

basic_sensor.title: Select Basic Sensor
basic_sensor.description: Select the Basic sensor entity for this keypad. This entity reports button press values (10/20/30/40/50). If it appears disabled in HA, the integration will enable it automatically.

mqtt.title: Z-Wave JS UI MQTT Settings
mqtt.description: Configure MQTT connection to your Z-Wave JS UI instance. The Node ID for your RFWC5 can be found in the Z-Wave JS UI control panel under your device details.

buttons.title: Configure All Buttons
buttons.description: Set labels and action types for all 5 buttons.

entities.title: Assign Entities
entities.description: Select the target entity for each active button.

abort.no_zwave_devices: No Z-Wave JS devices found. Ensure Z-Wave JS is set up.
abort.no_indicator_entities: No sensor or number entities found on the selected device.
abort.already_configured: This keypad has already been configured.

indicator.title: Select Indicator Entity
indicator.description: Select the indicator sensor or number entity for {device_name}.

basic_sensor.title: Select Basic Sensor
basic_sensor.description: Select the Basic sensor entity for this keypad. This entity reports button press values (10/20/30/40/50). If it appears disabled in HA, the integration will enable it automatically.

mqtt.title: Z-Wave JS UI MQTT Settings
mqtt.description: Configure MQTT connection to your Z-Wave JS UI instance. The Node ID for your RFWC5 can be found in the Z-Wave JS UI control panel under your device details.

buttons.title: Configure All Buttons
buttons.description: Set labels and action types for all 5 buttons.

entities.title: Assign Entities
entities.description: Select the target entity for each active button.

sync_leds.name: Sync LEDs
sync_leds.description: Force-sync all LED states to the keypad (useful after HA restart).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID of the keypad to sync. Leave blank for all keypads.

set_button_led.name: Set Button LED
set_button_led.description: Directly set the LED state of a specific button.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID of the target keypad.

state.name: State
state.description: True = LED on, False = LED off.
